source: Three Hundred Important Combinations — B. V. Raman
note: Combinations 50–63 and 68–69 are not detailed in the source excerpt; grouped ranges (e.g. 33-44, 75-106) are stored as a single row exactly as given.

combinations.name: Gajakesari
combinations.definition: Jupiter in a kendra from the Moon.
combinations.result: Polite, generous, lasting reputation.

combinations.name: Sunapha
combinations.definition: Planets (excluding the Sun) in the 2nd house from the Moon.
combinations.result: Self-earned property, kingly, wealthy.

combinations.name: Anapha
combinations.definition: Planets (excluding the Sun) in the 12th house from the Moon.
combinations.result: Majestic appearance, generous, self-respect.

combinations.name: Dhurdhura
combinations.definition: Planets on both sides of the Moon (2nd and 12th houses).
combinations.result: Bountiful, blessed with wealth and conveyances.

combinations.name: Kemadruma
combinations.definition: No planets on either side of the Moon.
combinations.result: Sorrowful, poor, rogue; cancelled if planets in kendras.

combinations.name: Chandra Mangala
combinations.definition: Mars conjoins the Moon.
combinations.result: Earnings through unscrupulous means, harsh to mother.

combinations.name: Adhi
combinations.definition: Benefics in the 6th, 7th, and 8th houses from the Moon.
combinations.result: Enjoyable life, healthy, long-lived.

combinations.name: Chatussagara
combinations.definition: All four kendras occupied by planets.
combinations.result: Earn good reputation, prosperous life.

combinations.name: Vasumati
combinations.definition: Benefics in the upachayas (3, 6, 10, 11) from Lagna or Moon.
combinations.result: Command plenty of wealth.

combinations.name: Rajalakshana
combinations.definition: Jupiter, Venus, Mercury, and the Moon in kendras.
combinations.result: Possess attractive appearance and high qualities.

combinations.name: Vanchanachora Bheeti
combinations.definition: Lagna occupied by malefic with Gulika in a trine; or Lagna lord with Rahu/Sani.
combinations.result: Afraid of being cheated, swindled, and robbed.

combinations.name: Sakata
combinations.definition: Moon in the 6th, 8th, or 12th from Jupiter.
combinations.result: Loses fortune (may regain it), insignificant.

combinations.name: Amala
combinations.definition: Benefic in the 10th from the Lagna or Moon.
combinations.result: Lasting fame, spotless character, prosperous.

combinations.name: Parvata
combinations.definition: Benefics in kendras, 6/8 houses empty or benefic-occupied.
combinations.result: Wealthy, head of town or village.

combinations.name: Kahala
combinations.definition: 4th and 9th lords in mutual kendras; Lagna lord strong.
combinations.result: Stubborn, daring, leader of a small army.

combinations.name: Vesi
combinations.definition: Planets (except Moon) in the 2nd from the Sun.
combinations.result: Fortunate, happy, virtuous, famous.

combinations.name: Vasi
combinations.definition: Planets (except Moon) in the 12th from the Sun.
combinations.result: Happy, prosperous, liberal.

combinations.name: Obhayachari
combinations.definition: Planets (except Moon) on both sides of the Sun.
combinations.result: Eloquent speaker, well-proportioned limbs.

combinations.name: Hamsa
combinations.definition: Jupiter in own/exaltation sign in a kendra.
combinations.result: Handsome body, righteous, pure mind.

combinations.name: Malavya
combinations.definition: Venus in own/exaltation sign in a kendra.
combinations.result: Strong-minded, wealthy, command vehicles.

combinations.name: Sasa
combinations.definition: Saturn in own/exaltation sign in a kendra.
combinations.result: Head of village/town, commands many servants.

combinations.name: Ruchaka
combinations.definition: Mars in own/exaltation sign in a kendra.
combinations.result: Strong physique, famous, leader of an army.

combinations.name: Bhadra
combinations.definition: Mercury in own/exaltation sign in a kendra.
combinations.result: Taciturn, lion's face, lives to old age.

combinations.name: Budhaditya
combinations.definition: Mercury combines with the Sun.
combinations.result: Highly intelligent, skillful, happy.

combinations.name: Mahabhagya
combinations.definition: Sun/Moon/Lagna in specific signs (odd for men, even for women).
combinations.result: Liberal, famous, long-lived.

combinations.name: Pushkala
combinations.definition: Moon lord conjoins Lagna lord in kendra/friend sign aspecting Lagna.
combinations.result: Wealthy, sweet speech, honored by kings.

combinations.name: Lakshmi
combinations.definition: Lagna lord powerful and 9th lord in own/exaltation in kendra/trikona.
combinations.result: Noble, man of high integrity and reputation.

combinations.name: Gauri
combinations.definition: 10th lord's Navamsa lord in exaltation in 10th with Lagna lord.
combinations.result: Respectable family, virtuous, praised by all.

combinations.name: Bharathi
combinations.definition: Navamsa lords of 2, 5, 11 lords are exalted with 9th lord.
combinations.result: World famous, reputable scholar, religious.

combinations.name: Kusuma
combinations.definition: Jupiter in Lagna, Moon in 7th, Sun in 2nd.
combinations.result: King or equal, helps others.

combinations.name: Chapa
combinations.definition: Lagna lord exalted, 4th and 10th lords interchanged.
combinations.result: Grace a King's Council, wealthy, strength.

combinations.name: Sreenatha
combinations.definition: Exalted 7th lord in 10th, 10th lord in 9th.
combinations.result: Agreeable speaker, good wife and children.

combinations.name: Malika Yogas
combinations.definition: Planets in seven contiguous houses from a specific house.
combinations.result: Result varies by house (e.g., Lagna Malika: King).

combinations.name: Sankha
combinations.definition: 5th and 6th lords in mutual kendras, Lagna lord powerful.
combinations.result: Learned in sciences, blessed with family.

combinations.name: Bheri
combinations.definition: Lagna lord, Jupiter, and Moon in mutual kendras; 9th lord strong.
combinations.result: Long-lived, free from disease, happy life.

combinations.name: Matsya
combinations.definition: Specific malefic/benefic distribution in Lagna, 9th, 5th, 4th/8th.
combinations.result: Clever prophet, ocean of kindness.

combinations.name: Mridanga
combinations.definition: Navamsa lord of exalted planet in trine/quadrant with own/exaltation sign.
combinations.result: Respected by rulers, famous, attractive.

combinations.name: Parijata
combinations.definition: Sign/Navamsa lord of Lagna lord in kendra/trikona/own/exaltation.
combinations.result: Ruler of a vast empire, powerful.

combinations.name: Vishnu
combinations.definition: 9, 10 lords and Navamsa lord of 9 in kendra/trikona/exaltation.
combinations.result: Enjoys luxurious foods, long-lived, charitable.

combinations.name: Brahma
combinations.definition: Jupiter/Venus and Mercury in specific kendras from 9, 11, and Lagna.
combinations.result: Enjoy luxurious foods, long-lived.

combinations.name: Indra
combinations.definition: Lords of 5 and 11 interchange; Moon in 5th.
combinations.result: Highly courageous, lasting fame.

combinations.name: Ravi
combinations.definition: Sun joins 10th, 10th lord in 3rd with Saturn.
combinations.result: Respected by rulers, famous after 15th year.

combinations.name: Gola
combinations.definition: Full Moon in 9th with Jupiter/Venus; Mercury joins Navamsa Lagna.
combinations.result: Polite, head of village, long-lived.

combinations.name: Thrilochana
combinations.definition: Sun, Moon, and Mars in mutual trines.
combinations.result: Great wealth, terror to enemies, long-lived.

combinations.name: Samudra
combinations.definition: Planets in 2, 4, 6, 8, 10, 12 houses.
combinations.result: Be a king or an equal.

combinations.name: Jaya
combinations.definition: 6th lord debilitated, 10th lord exalted.
combinations.result: Successful and long-lived.

combinations.name: Kulavardhana
combinations.definition: All planets in 5th from Lagna, Sun, and Moon.
combinations.result: Unbroken line of successors, wealthy.

combinations.name: Nabhasa Yogas
combinations.definition: Complex planetary patterns (e.g., Yupa, Ishu, Sakti, Rajju).
combinations.result: Vary: Yupa (liberal), Ishu (successful), Sakti (lazy).

combinations.name: Duryoga
combinations.definition: 10th lord in the 6th, 8th, or 12th.
combinations.result: Derive no fruit from own labor, insignificant.

combinations.name: Daridra
combinations.definition: 11th lord in the 6th, 8th, or 12th.
combinations.result: Contract huge debts, poor, suffer auditory trouble.

combinations.name: Harsha / Sarala / Vimala
combinations.definition: 6, 8, or 12 lords in 6th, 8th, or 12th houses.
combinations.result: Harsha (fortunate), Sarala (long-lived), Vimala (independent).

combinations.name: Sareera Soukhya
combinations.definition: Lagna lord, Jupiter, or Venus in a quadrant.
combinations.result: Endowed with long life, wealth, political favor.

combinations.name: Dehapushti
combinations.definition: Lagna lord in movable sign aspected by a benefic.
combinations.result: Well-developed body, rich, enjoy life.

combinations.name: Dehakashta
combinations.definition: Lagna lord with a malefic or in the 8th house.
combinations.result: Devoid of bodily comforts.

combinations.name: Rogagrastha
combinations.definition: Lagna lord with 6/8/12 lord; or weak lord in quadrant/trine.
combinations.result: Suffer from diseases, weak constitution.

combinations.name: Krisanga
combinations.definition: Lagna lord in dry sign or malefics join dry Navamsa Lagna.
combinations.result: Emaciated body, suffer from bodily pains.

combinations.name: Dehasthoulya
combinations.definition: Varying Lagna lord/Navamsa/Jupiter placements in watery signs.
combinations.result: Possess a corpulent (stout) body.

combinations.name: Sada Sanchara
combinations.definition: Lagna lord or lord of sign with Lagna lord in movable sign.
combinations.result: Be a wanderer, travel agent, or diplomat.

combinations.name: Dhana Yogas
combinations.definition: Various 2nd and 5th house lord combinations.
combinations.result: Acquire immense wealth.

combinations.name: Bahudravyarjana
combinations.definition: Lagna lord in 2nd, 2nd lord in 11th, 11th lord in Lagna.
combinations.result: Earn lot of money, amass good fortune.

combinations.name: Swaveeryaddhana
combinations.definition: Lagna lord powerful in kendra with Jupiter; 2nd lord in Vaiseshikamsa.
combinations.result: Earn money by own efforts and exertions.

combinations.name: Madhya Dhana
combinations.definition: 2nd lord with Kalabala joins Lagna/11th lords in quadrant/trine.
combinations.result: Acquire money by self-effort in middle life.

combinations.name: Antya Dhana
combinations.definition: 2nd and 1st lords sign lord with natural benefic in Lagna.
combinations.result: Acquire finance towards the last part of life.

combinations.name: Balya Dhana
combinations.definition: 2nd and 10th lords in kendra aspected by Navamsa lord of Lagna.
combinations.result: Acquire immense riches in early part of life.

combinations.name: Bhratru Dhana
combinations.definition: Lagna/2nd lords join 3rd with benefics; or 3rd lord in 2nd with Jupiter.
combinations.result: Get money through brothers and relatives.

combinations.name: Matru Dhana
combinations.definition: 2nd lord joins 4th lord or is aspected by it.
combinations.result: Earns money with help of one's mother.

combinations.name: Putra Dhana
combinations.definition: Strong 2nd lord with 5th lord/Jupiter; Lagna lord in Vaiseshikamsa.
combinations.result: Gets wealth through his sons.

combinations.name: Satru Dhana
combinations.definition: Strong 2nd lord with 6th lord/Mars; Lagna lord in Vaiseshikamsa.
combinations.result: Earns money through his enemies.

combinations.name: Kalatra Dhana
combinations.definition: Strong 2nd lord with 7th lord/Venus; Lagna lord powerful.
combinations.result: Subject will earn money through wife.

combinations.name: Amaranantha
combinations.definition: Wealth-giving planets in the 2nd house (strong/own/exaltation).
combinations.result: Native will enjoy wealth throughout life.

combinations.name: Ayatnadhana
combinations.definition: Lords of the Lagna and the 2nd exchange places.
combinations.result: Earns wealth without much effort.

combinations.name: Daridra Yogas
combinations.definition: Inauspicious combinations of 6/8/12 lords and Lagna/2nd lords.
combinations.result: Produce dire poverty, financial straits.

combinations.name: Yukthi Vagmi
combinations.definition: 2nd lord with benefic in kendra/trikona/exaltation with Jupiter.
combinations.result: Become an eloquent and skilled speaker.

combinations.name: Parihasaka
combinations.definition: Navamsa lord of the Sun joins the 2nd house.
combinations.result: Become a humorous and witty speaker.

combinations.name: Asatyavadi
combinations.definition: 2nd lord in house of Sani/Mars; malefics in kendra/trikona.
combinations.result: The native will be a liar.

combinations.name: Jada
combinations.definition: 2nd lord in the 10th house with malefics.
combinations.result: Becomes nervous in public assemblies.
